title: castilleja stenantha subsp. spiralis
intro: Castilleja stenantha subsp. spiralis, also known as Spiral Indian Paintbrush, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health. In herbal preparations, Castilleja stenantha subsp. spiralis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its potential medicinal and health benefits.
